description: Checklist for ERC4626-like vaults, share accounting, deposits, redemptions, and donation/deflation behavior.
core_invariants: share price must not be manipulable by unsolicited asset transfers or flash-loan supply changes
deposit/redeem must preserve user value within bounded rounding dust
vault accounting must distinguish actual assets from pending, external, or untracked balances
trust_boundaries: underlying token balanceOf vs accounting variable
common_bug_classes: principal locked by external wrapper failure
check_items: Check totalAssets source and unsolicited donation handling
Review minShares/minAssets checks under direct asset transfers
Test first depositor and tiny deposit states
Verify flash-loan hooks cannot manipulate share math
test_ideas: fuzz tiny deposits and high exchange rates
simulate queue withdrawal before/after slashing or loss event
